title: anthyllis vulneraria proles polyphylla
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria proles polyphylla, also known as Kidney Vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and promoting tissue repair due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Herbal preparations of Kidney Vetch can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support skin health, treat skin conditions, and promote overall well-being.
